title: Canada Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q2 2025
content: In the second quarter of 2025, total vehicle sales continued to increase, and recorded a YoY rise of 5.90%. In contrast, ZEV penetration decreased further to Â 8.56%, marking the lowest level in the past five quarters. This was likely due to a rollback of the iZEV program earlier this year. Additionally, the Canadian Government has paused the 2026 ZEV sales target. Q2 2025 saw a 29.53% YoY dip in ZEV sales. Battery Electric Vehicles (BEVs), which account for 63.63% Â of total ZEV sales, recorded a 39,24% YoY decrease in Q2 2025.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
